sentinels.name: aria-birthday-venue-monitor
sentinels.instruction:
Monitor birthday party venue email replies. Config file has all IDs and contacts.

## Step 0 — Load config + memory each run
Read ~/.hammurabi/aria-venue-sentinel-config.md for all IDs, emails, auth setup, and block IDs.
Read sentinel memory for per-venue state from prior runs.

## CRITICAL: Tool Rules
- Email reads: gog CLI via gog_helper.py ONLY (direct gog bash is hook-blocked).
  Pattern: python3 <sentinel_dir>/gog_helper.py gmail search "from:VENUE_EMAIL" --account yu.gu.columbia@gmail.com --plain --max 10
- Drafts: gog_helper.py gmail drafts create (never send — see Draft Rule).
- Notion: curl with personal key ONLY. No Notion MCP.
- gog auth: see config file for setup command.

## Goal Per Venue
Extract: A.Cost  B.Package(inclusions/duration/capacity)  C.Process(booking/deposit/deadlines)

## Each Run — Per Venue Workflow

### 1. Check for new emails
Search for inbound from venue email AND outbound to venue.
Record each email in memory: Message ID, thread ID, timestamp, direction (→ sent / ← received), brief content summary.

### 2. Update Notion — TWO locations per venue

**A. Table row** (config: "Notion Row IDs") — PATCH /v1/blocks/{row_id}
Body: {"table_row": {"cells": [[Venue],[Contact],[Status],[Price Range],[Capacity],[Notes]]}}
All 6 cells required. Notes = A/B/C summary only (keep short).

**B. Email Threads section** (config: "Notion Email Threads Section Block IDs") — PATCH /v1/blocks/{log_block_id}
Body: {"paragraph": {"rich_text": [{"type": "text", "text": {"content": "FULL_EMAIL_LOG"}}]}}
Format for the email log content:
  → YYYY-MM-DD HH:MMZ  Nick → venue@email.com: [subject/summary]
  ← YYYY-MM-DD HH:MMZ  ContactName: [key content summary]
  → YYYY-MM-DD HH:MMZ  Nick [DRAFT created, not sent]: [what it asks]
Include ALL emails found — sent and received — chronologically.
Update this block on EVERY run if new emails are found (replace full content, not append).

### 3. Draft Rule — NEVER AUTO-SEND
The sentinel MUST NOT auto-send emails. Instead:

**Scenario A — venue is asking a question or awaiting Nick's decision:**
  - Create a draft reply using gog_helper.py gmail drafts create
  - Include --reply-to-message-id of the venue's last message, --cc CC_ADDRESS (from config)
  - Table Status → "📝 Draft in inbox — awaiting review"
  - Email log entry → "→ [timestamp] [DRAFT created]: [brief description]"

**Scenario B — no reply and 48h+ since last outbound AND last draft (nudge):**
  - Create a polite nudge draft (not sent)
  - Table Status → "📝 Nudge draft in inbox — awaiting review"
  - Email log entry → "→ [timestamp] [DRAFT nudge created]"

**Scenario C — reply received, A/B/C incomplete, no open questions:**
  - Create a follow-up draft asking remaining questions
  - Table Status → "📝 Follow-up draft in inbox — awaiting review"

For ALL drafts: log the draft message ID in memory to avoid duplicates.
Do NOT create a draft if one was already created within the last 48h (check memory).

### 4. Draft Content Rules — STRICT
All drafts written by the sentinel MUST follow these rules without exception:

**NEVER include in any draft:**
- Confirmations of any kind ("We'd like to confirm...", "We'll take the slot...", "We're planning to book...")
- Promises or commitments ("We'll be there", "We're going ahead with...", "Count us in")
- Any implication that a decision has been made ("We've decided...", "We're going with...")
- Date/time commitments ("We'll come on May 17", "We want the 3 PM slot")
- Deposit or payment intent ("We'll send the deposit", "We'll pay via...")

**Drafts must only:**
- Ask clarifying questions to gather missing A/B/C info
- Express general interest without committing ("We're exploring options for a birthday party")
- Request additional information ("Could you share more details about X?")
- Follow up on an unanswered inquiry ("We sent an inquiry on [date] and wanted to check in")
- Acknowledge a venue's reply neutrally ("Thank you for your response — we have a few follow-up questions")

The draft is for Nick to review and edit before sending. Write it as a starting point, not a final answer.

### 5. A/B/C complete — no open questions
Table Status → "✅ Info complete". No draft needed.

### 6. All venues done
All info-complete or declined: run hammurabi sentinel complete on own sentinel ID.

## Standing Rules
- Names OK in emails. NEVER mention age, birthdate, or milestone details.
- Funzy Play: DO NOT create any draft until Lingyi (JC planner) replies.
- Luna De Papel: info-complete, no action needed.
- LSC: May 17 unavailable. A/B/C extracted. No draft until Nick decides on alternate date.
- Notion table status values: Emailed / Replied / Info complete / Declined /
  📝 Draft in inbox — awaiting review / 📝 Nudge draft in inbox — awaiting review /
  📝 Follow-up draft in inbox — awaiting review

## Notion API Reminder
- Table rows: PATCH /v1/blocks/{row_id} with table_row.cells (all 6 cells)
- Email log paragraphs: PATCH /v1/blocks/{log_block_id} with paragraph.rich_text
- Use personal_api_key from config (path in config file)
- notion_update_rows.py in sentinel dir can be reused/extended

sentinels.seedMemory: Config: ~/.hammurabi/aria-venue-sentinel-config.md — read every run. Contains gog auth, thread IDs, venue emails, CC address, Notion key path, table row IDs, AND email log block IDs. DRAFT RULE: Never auto-send. Never confirm or promise anything — drafts are for Nick to review only.
